body:
## Summary
- Improved lobby responsive layout for smaller desktop screens
- Adjusted sidebar, cards, spacing, and right panel scaling
- Fixed overflow and component clipping issues
- Preserved existing large-screen layout and backend logic
## Notes
- Frontend responsive style updates only
- No backend or gameplay logic changes

## 修改内容
- 优化 Lobby 页面小屏幕响应式布局
- 调整侧边栏、卡片、间距和右侧面板缩放
- 修复组件溢出和按钮被截断的问题
- 保持当前大屏布局和后端逻辑不变
## 说明
- 仅修改前端响应式样式
- 未改动后端或游戏逻辑
title: fix: improve lobby responsive layout on small screens
